raw_text:
64. Mold Trial Engineer

Job Summary  
Conducts mold trials to validate mo ld performance and ensure production readiness.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Perform mold trials on injection/blow molding machines  
• Optimize process parameters (temperature, pressure, cycle time)  
• Identify and resolve molding defects  
• Coordinate with design and production teams  
• Prepare trial reports and recommendations  
• Support production ramp -up  
Required Skills  
• Injection/blow molding process knowledge  
• Mold troubleshooting expertise  
• Data analysis and reporting  
• Problem -solving skill s  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Plastics  
Experience  
• 3–6 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹30,000 – ₹65,000 per month
